imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Dark atmospheric barbershop interior with leather chairs, warm Edison bulb lighting, brick walls, and vintage barber poles (hero-banner.dim_1400x700.png)
- Circular barbershop logo mark featuring a classic straight razor and scissors crossed over a comb, gold on dark background (barber-logo.dim_256x256.png)
- Classic men's haircut styled shot, side profile, clean fade on dark background (gallery-cut-1.dim_600x600.png)
- Barber applying hot towel shave to a client in a vintage leather chair (gallery-shave-2.dim_600x600.png)
- Close-up of barbershop tools: scissors, combs, clippers arranged on a marble surface (gallery-tools-3.dim_600x600.png)
- Stylized portrait of a male barber in apron holding scissors, warm studio lighting (gallery-barber-4.dim_600x600.png)
- Neutral male avatar silhouette illustration for staff placeholder (staff-avatar-placeholder.dim_256x256.png)

existing_features.title: Build a hero section with a full-width banner featuring the barbershop name, a bold tagline, and a prominent 'Book Now' call-to-action button that scrolls to the booking/contact section.
Create a Services section that displays all services fetched from the backend in a card grid layout, showing each service's name, description, price, and estimated duration.
Create a Meet the Team section that displays staff members fetched from the backend in a card layout, showing each member's name, role, and bio, with an avatar placeholder image.
Create a Gallery section showcasing barbershop atmosphere and haircut style images using generated static assets displayed in a responsive masonry or grid layout.

Create a Contact & Hours section displaying the barbershop's address, phone number, email, and weekly business hours fetched from the backend. Include a simple appointment request form (name, phone, preferred date/time, service) that stores submissions in the backend.
Build a sticky top navigation bar with the barbershop logo/name and smooth-scroll links to all sections (Home, Services, Team, Gallery, Contact). Include a mobile hamburger menu for small screens.

Apply a cohesive dark, masculine barbershop visual theme throughout the site: deep charcoal/black backgrounds, warm gold and off-white accent colors, sharp serif or bold sans-serif typography, subtle texture overlays, and clean whitespace. Enforce this theme consistently across all sections and components.
Render all generated images (hero banner, gallery images, logo) as static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated throughout the site.

new_feature_requests.summary: Create a backend actor that stores barbershop information including services (name, description, price, duration), staff members (name, role, bio, photo placeholder), business hours, and contact details. Expose query functions to retrieve all of this data.
